markdown-editor.title: Markdown Uređivač & Article Pregled
markdown-editor.description: Write Markdown on the left and see the rendered article preview on the right before you decide to publish it.

json-viewer.title: JSON Preglednik & Formatter
json-viewer.description: Pregledaj, format, and preview JSON structures with a live editor and the richer JSON tools side by side.

html-preview.title: HTML Pregled Sandbox
html-preview.description: Prototype HTML snippets in a lightweight split view and render them in the built-in sandbox before sharing.

xml-viewer.title: XML Preglednik & Inspektor
xml-viewer.description: Load XML, inspect nested nodes, and validate the rendered structure in a tool page built for config and document files.

yaml-viewer.title: YAML Preglednik & Tree Explorer
yaml-viewer.description: Explore YAML like a structured document with collapsible sections, a live editor, and an instant preview.

csv-viewer.title: CSV Table Pregled
csv-viewer.description: Pregled CSV data in a readable table layout and tweak the source without needing to create a paste first.

mermaid-live-editor.title: Mermaid Diagram Live Pregled
mermaid-live-editor.description: Edit Mermaid dijagrame with a live visual render so architecture and flowchart snippets are share-ready faster.

geojson-viewer.title: GeoJSON Map Pregled
geojson-viewer.description: Pregled spatial data with a map-first experience while editing raw GeoJSON side by side.

svg-viewer.title: SVG Preglednik
svg-viewer.description: Test SVG snippets in a clean split layout and see the resulting vector preview immediately.

diff-viewer.title: Diff Preglednik
diff-viewer.description: Review patches and code changes in a dedicated diff preview page that behaves more like a quick review tool.

env-viewer.title: .env / Konfiguracija Preglednik
env-viewer.description: Pregledaj environment-style config files in a dedicated preview tool that is useful for app settings and deployment data.

terraform-viewer.title: Terraform / HCL Pregled
terraform-viewer.description: Edit Terraform and HCL files with a dedicated infrastructure preview, then publish the snippet when it is ready.

log-viewer.title: Log Preglednik
log-viewer.description: Paste application or server logs into a live viewer to filter and inspect them before creating a shareable paste.

http-viewer.title: HTTP / cURL Pregled
http-viewer.description: Compose HTTP zahtjeve or cURL calls and inspect them in a dedicated request preview before publishing or sharing.

github-actions-viewer.title: GitHub Actions Tijek rada Pregled
github-actions-viewer.description: Pregledaj workflow YAML with a specialized GitHub Actions preview that highlights jobs and steps while you edit.

ansible-viewer.title: Ansible Playbook Pregled
ansible-viewer.description: Work on Ansible playbooks in a split editor and preview tasks, roles, and hosts in a clearer operational view.

prometheus-rules-viewer.title: Prometheus / Alert Rules Pregled
prometheus-rules-viewer.description: Pregled monitoring rules and alert groups in a page tailored to observability configs and alert definitions.

regex-lab.title: Regex Tester
regex-lab.description: Prototype, inspect, and share regular expressions with a dedicated regex-focused preview.

terminal-cast-viewer.title: Terminal Cast Pregled
terminal-cast-viewer.description: Pregled recorded terminalske sesije and shell demos before you publish them as pastes.

calendar-viewer.title: ICS Calendar Pregled
calendar-viewer.description: Pregledaj calendar invites and event schedules in a quick reader-friendly preview.

json-to-yaml.title: Pretvori JSON to YAML
json-to-yaml.description: Turn API payloads or config objects into clean YAML for infra and docs workflows.

yaml-to-json.title: Pretvori YAML to JSON
yaml-to-json.description: Turn deployment and config-style YAML into machine-friendly JSON.

json-to-env.title: Pretvori JSON to .env
json-to-env.description: Flatten JSON configuration into environment variables for apps and deployments.

env-to-json.title: Pretvori .env to JSON
env-to-json.description: Turn environment variables into JSON for API payloads, docs, or quick inspection.

csv-to-json.title: Pretvori CSV to JSON
csv-to-json.description: Turn tabular CSV data into JSON arrays you can feed into APIs or tooling.

json-to-csv.title: Pretvori JSON to CSV
json-to-csv.description: Turn JSON arrays into flat CSV output for spreadsheets and exports.

http-to-curl.title: Pretvori HTTP to cURL
http-to-curl.description: Turn raw HTTP request files into cURL commands you can run in a shell.

curl-to-http.title: Pretvori cURL to HTTP
curl-to-http.description: Turn cURL commands into clean HTTP request files for docs and API tooling.

yaml-to-env.title: Pretvori YAML to .env
yaml-to-env.description: Flatten simple YAML configuration into environment variables for deployment use.

env-to-yaml.title: Pretvori .env to YAML
env-to-yaml.description: Turn environment variables into YAML for docs and human-readable config snapshots.

csv-to-markdown.title: Pretvori CSV to Markdown Table
csv-to-markdown.description: Turn CSV exports into Markdown tables for docs, READMEs, and issues.

json-to-markdown.title: Pretvori JSON to Markdown Table
json-to-markdown.description: Turn arrays of JSON objects into clean Markdown tables.

http-to-json.title: Pretvori HTTP to JSON
http-to-json.description: Turn raw HTTP request files into JSON objects for tooling and inspection.

curl-to-json.title: Pretvori cURL to JSON
curl-to-json.description: Turn cURL commands into JSON request objects for downstream processing.

data-to-mermaid.title: Podaci to Mermaid Charts
data-to-mermaid.description: Turn JSON, YAML, or CSV datasets into Mermaid pie, bar, line, grouped, and combo charts with field mapping and aggregation.

mermaid-theme-builder.title: Mermaid Theme Builder
mermaid-theme-builder.description: Tune Mermaid colors, fonts, spacing, and diagram styling, then export the themed config plus diagram.

data-to-mermaid-er.title: Podaci to Mermaid ER Diagram
data-to-mermaid-er.description: Infer Mermaid ER diagrams from JSON, YAML, or CSV schema-like data structures.

sql-to-mermaid-er.title: SQL to Mermaid ER
sql-to-mermaid-er.description: Parse CREATE TABLE statements into Mermaid ER diagrams with tables and foreign keys.

infra-to-mermaid.title: Infra to Mermaid
infra-to-mermaid.description: Pretvori Compose, Kubernetes, Terraform, and GitHub Actions definitions into Mermaid architecture flowcharts.

markdown-to-mermaid.title: Markdown to Mermaid Mindmap / Flow
markdown-to-mermaid.description: Turn Markdown headings and bullet outlines into Mermaid mindmaps or flowcharts.

data-to-class-diagram.title: JSON / YAML to Class Diagram
data-to-class-diagram.description: Map nested structured data to Mermaid class diagrams with inferred fields and relationships.

mermaid-image-export.title: Mermaid Image Export Alat
mermaid-image-export.description: Export Mermaid dijagrame as PNG or SVG with padding, scale, background, and watermark options.

diff-lab.title: Diff Lab
diff-lab.description: Compare two textareas, inspect a rendered diff, and export the unified patch.

jwt-inspector.title: JWT Inspektor
jwt-inspector.description: Decode JWTs, inspect claims, and check timestamps bez slanja tokena bilo kamo.

hash-generator.title: Hash Generator
hash-generator.description: Generiraj SHA hashes for text or payloads and compare lengths at a glance.

secret-generator.title: Secret Generator
secret-generator.description: Generiraj UUIDs, hex tokens, and Base64URL secrets for quick local testing and setup.

password-generator.title: Password Generator
password-generator.description: Generiraj passwords with configurable character sets, length, count, and ambiguity rules.

cron-explainer.title: Cron Explainer
cron-explainer.description: Understand cron expressions with a readable breakdown of schedule fields and timing.

base64-lab.title: Base64 Lab
base64-lab.description: Kodiraj i dekodiraj Base64 or Base64URL strings lokalno for payload and token workflows.

url-encoder.title: URL Kodirajr / Decoder
url-encoder.description: Kodiraj i dekodiraj URL components and full query values without leaving the preglednik.

timestamp-converter.title: Vrijemestamp Pretvorier
timestamp-converter.description: Pretvori between Unix timestamps, ISO dates, and local times for debugging and docs.

slug-generator.title: Slug Generator
slug-generator.description: Generiraj slugove, snake_case, and other URL-friendly variants from plain text.

case-converter.title: Case Pretvorier
case-converter.description: Switch text between lowercase, uppercase, title case, camelCase, snake_case, and more.

query-string-parser.title: Query String Parser
query-string-parser.description: Parse query strings into structured data and rebuild them cleanly.

html-entity-tool.title: HTML Entity Kodirajr / Decoder
html-entity-tool.description: Kodiraj or decode HTML entities for templates, docs, and pasted snippets.

json-string-tool.title: JSON String Escape Alat
json-string-tool.description: Escape text for JSON strings or unescape JSON string content back to plain text.

regex-escape-tool.title: Regex Escape Alat
regex-escape-tool.description: Escape plain text for regex patterns or unescape regex-special characters.

color-converter.title: Color Pretvorier
color-converter.description: Pretvori colors between HEX, RGB, and HSL with a live swatch preview.

number-base-converter.title: Number Base Pretvorier
number-base-converter.description: Pretvori values between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal.

text-sorter.title: Text Sorter & Deduper
text-sorter.description: Sort line-based lists, remove duplicates, and reverse ordering quickly.

lorem-ipsum-generator.title: Lorem Ipsum Generator
lorem-ipsum-generator.description: Generiraj placeholder words, sentences, or paragraphs for UI and content mockups.

uuid-inspector.title: UUID Inspektor
uuid-inspector.description: Validate UUIDs and inspect their version, variant, and nil status.

word-stats.title: Word / Line / Character Counter
word-stats.description: Count words, lines, characters, paragraphs, reading time, and other useful text metrics.

nginx-log-inspector.title: NGINX Logs Inspektor
nginx-log-inspector.description: Parse common NGINX access logs, inspect status codes and top paths, and export structured request data.

apache-log-inspector.title: Apache Logs Inspektor
apache-log-inspector.description: Pregledaj Apache access logs with parsed requests, status groups, path summaries, and fast filtering.

caddy-config-generator.title: Vizualno Caddy File Generator
caddy-config-generator.description: Build production-friendly Caddy configs for statične stranice or reverse proxyje with spremne za deploy defaults.

nginx-config-generator.title: Vizualno NGINX File Generator
nginx-config-generator.description: Generiraj NGINX virtual host configs for reverse proxy and static site deployments with common production settings.

apache-config-generator.title: Vizualno Apache File Generator
apache-config-generator.description: Generiraj Apache VirtualHost configs with HTTPS placeholders, proxying, static hosting, logging, and caching options.

dockerfile-generator.title: Vizualno Dockerfile Generator
dockerfile-generator.description: Generiraj Dockerfiles for Node, Bun, Java JAR, Python, or static assets with useful deployment defaults.

jar-start-script-generator.title: Vizualno JAR Start Script Generator
jar-start-script-generator.description: Generiraj start.sh or start.bat launch scripts for Java JAR applications with JVM args, logs, and app flags.

systemd-service-generator.title: Generator systemd servisa
systemd-service-generator.description: Generiraj systemd unit files for apps and services with restart policy, environment variables, and working directory setup.

compose-stack-generator.title: Docker Compose Web Stack Generator
compose-stack-generator.description: Generiraj a simple web stack with app, proxy, Postgres, and Redis services for local or server deployment.

docs.title: Dokumentacija Alati
docs.description: Alati for markdown articles, diffs, and shareable tijekove rada dokumentacije.
docs.seoDescription: Explore Pastefy dokumentacijske alate for Markdown članke, diffs, and čitljive načine dijeljenja built for developersku dokumentaciju.

data.title: Podaci Alati
data.description: Pregledaj JSON, YAML, XML, CSV, and other strukturirane formate with bogatije preglede.
data.seoDescription: Use Pastefy data tools to inspect and preview JSON, YAML, XML, CSV, and other structured developerske formate.

visual.title: Vizualno Alati
visual.description: Pregled HTML, SVG, Mermaid, and prostorne formate in a more vizualni tijek uređivanja.
visual.seoDescription: Use Pastefy visual tools to preview HTML, SVG, Mermaid dijagrame, GeoJSON maps, and other visual formats.

mermaid.title: Mermaid Alati
mermaid.description: Find Mermaid uređivače, graditelje tema, exporters, and generatore dijagrama in one place.
mermaid.seoDescription: Use Pastefy Mermaid tools to edit diagrams, build themes, export images, and generate Mermaid charts, ER diagrams, class diagrams, and infra views.

api.title: API Alati
api.description: Work with HTTP zahtjeve, payloads, and API-facing developer content in focused tools.
api.seoDescription: Use Pastefy API tools to inspect HTTP zahtjeve, formate payloada, and API-oriented developerske isječke before sharing.

infra.title: Infrastruktura Alati
infra.description: Pregled Terraform, config files, and infrastrukturne isječke in a čišćem radnom prostoru.
infra.seoDescription: Use Pastefy infrastructure tools for Terraform, datoteke okruženja, configs, and infrastructure-oriented workflows.

operations.title: Operacije Alati
operations.description: Pregledaj logs, pravila upozorenja, and operativne podatke za produkciju with tools built for operativni rad nakon deploya.
operations.seoDescription: Use Pastefy operations tools to inspect logs, alert rules, and production-focused operational content and diagnostics.

server.title: Konfiguracija servera Alati
server.description: Generiraj spremne za deploy Caddy, NGINX, and Apache konfiguracije web-stranica with the common options you usually need.
server.seoDescription: Use Pastefy server config tools to generate Caddy, NGINX, and Apache configs for statične stranice and reverse proxyje.

deploy.title: Deploy Alati
deploy.description: Generiraj Dockerfiles, Compose stacks, skripte za pokretanje, and systemd units for uobičajene deploy tijekove rada.
deploy.seoDescription: Use Pastefy deployment tools to generate Dockerfiles, Compose files, skripte za pokretanje, and systemd services.

automation.title: Automatizacija Alati
automation.description: Build around workflows, schedules, GitHub Actions, and developerski sadržaj spreman za automatizaciju.
automation.seoDescription: Use Pastefy automation tools for cron schedules, GitHub Actions, Ansible, and automation-focused developer workflows.

security.title: Sigurnost Alati
security.description: Pregledaj tokens, generate secrets, and work with sigurnosno osjetljivim tekstom lokalno u pregledniku.
security.seoDescription: Use Pastefy security tools to inspect JWTs, generate passwords and secrets, and handle sensitive data lokalno.

terminal.title: Terminal Alati
terminal.description: Pregled terminalske sesije and terminal-shaped sadržaj za dijeljenje with cleaner rendering.
terminal.seoDescription: Use Pastefy terminal tools to preview terminal recordings and terminal-style developer content before sharing.

convert.title: Alati za konverziju
convert.description: Pretvori between uobičajenih developerskih formata like JSON, YAML, CSV, .env, HTTP, and cURL.
convert.seoDescription: Use Pastefy conversion tools to convert JSON, YAML, CSV, .env, HTTP, cURL, and other developerske formate.

inspect.title: Alati za inspekciju
inspect.description: Analiziraj, uspoređuj i pregledavaj text, diffs, identifiers, and structured input quickly.
inspect.seoDescription: Use Pastefy inspect tools to analyze diffs, UUIDs, query strings, number bases, and text-heavy developer data.

generate.title: Alati za generiranje
generate.description: Generiraj slugove, placeholder sadržaj, colors, values, and other useful izlaz spreman za developere.
generate.seoDescription: Use Pastefy generate tools to create slugs, sample content, colors, secrets, and other useful developer output.

encode.title: Alati za kodiranje
encode.description: Kodiraj i dekodiraj URL, Base64, HTML entity, JSON string, and regex-friendly content.
encode.seoDescription: Use Pastefy encoding tools for Base64, URL encoding, HTML entities, JSON string escaping, and regex escaping.

time.title: Vremenski alati
time.description: Pretvaraj timestampove and reason about schedules with lagane alate u pregledniku.
time.seoDescription: Use Pastefy time tools to convert timestamps and inspect scheduling data in a simple preglednik-based workspace.

visualize.title: Alati za vizualizaciju
visualize.description: Pretvori developerske podatke u dijagrame, grafikone, prikaze klasa, ER modele, and Mermaid izvoze.
visualize.seoDescription: Use Pastefy visualization tools to turn SQL, JSON, YAML, CSV, Markdown, and infra files into Mermaid dijagrame and charts.
